utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Present, includes physical and mental health insurance with costs for three family members; also includes wellness programs and specialist add-on with costs. This meets the requirement. 2) property_coverage: Present, specifies home/contents insurance with cost (€60/month). Meets the requirement. 3) travel_coverage: Present, specifies travel insurance with cost (€50/month). Meets the requirement. 4) additional_services: Present, specifies an enhancement service (Premium Insurance Membership) with cost (€20/month). Meets the requirement. 5) total_budget: Present, provides a monthly cost (€1086.75). It includes a breakdown label (monthly_cost) though not itemized by category; the format only requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; monthly is provided. Thus, all five items are included and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each item in the final coverage plan and matched it to the exact corresponding option in the ground-truth ratings. For health: Physical HealthFirst Standard Plan maps to HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical health rating 7). Mental LifeFirst Standard Plan maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan in mental health (rating 8). Physical VitalPlus Standard Plan maps to VitalPlus Standard Plan in physical health (rating 6). Mental InsurePlus Standard Plan maps to InsurePlus Standard Plan in mental health (rating 6). Specialist Access Add-on maps to Specialist Access (rating 10). Wellness Programs (both physical and mental wellness entries are one category) map to Wellness Programs (rating 10). For property: Family Home Content InsurePlus Standard Coverage matches InsurePlus Standard Coverage under home_content (rating 7). For travel: Family Travel LifeFirst Standard Plan maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance (rating 7). Additional services: Premium Insurance Membership maps to Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10).
